issues.title: HIRED auto-drop misses pending ActionItem cancellation + hire() non-atomic
issues.attack: on_application_hired does per-row save() bypassing drop() service, so pending ActionItems remain. hire() itself lacks transaction boundary with signal.
issues.response: Move HIRED logic entirely to hire() service with transaction.atomic() + select_for_update(). Losers drop via drop() call or equivalent bulk op.

issues.title: Concurrent hire race condition
issues.attack: No lock on project.closed_at check. Double-click or concurrent requests can create multiple hired_at rows.
issues.response: Add select_for_update() to hire(). Add DB partial UniqueConstraint on (project) where hired_at IS NOT NULL.

issues.title: sync_project_status_field missing result reset → DB crash
issues.attack: Signal only updates status, not result. FINAL-SPEC requires result='' when open.
issues.response: Worse than expected: project_open_implies_empty_result CheckConstraint already exists in models.py:174. Updating status=open without result='' causes IntegrityError.

issues.title: on_application_hired doesn't detect transition
issues.attack: Only checks hired_at is not None, fires on every save of hired Application.
issues.response: Resolved by I-01 fix (move to service). Signal becomes unnecessary.

issues.title: drop() lacks atomic transaction
issues.attack: application.save() and ActionItem.update() run in separate autocommit transactions.

issues.title: Auto-drop per-row save() loop causes signal storm
issues.attack: Per-row save() triggers post_save cascade and N+1 queries.
issues.response: Signal cascade: accepted, switch to bulk update(). Performance at 5-20 scale: rebutted, not a real concern at headhunting volumes.

issues.title: Application state machine incomplete
issues.attack: Double drop, double hire, restore on closed project all unguarded.
issues.response: Add explicit transition guards to all lifecycle functions.

issues.title: ActionItem state machine undefined
issues.attack: create_action ignores application.is_active and project.closed_at. Status transitions unvalidated.
issues.response: Add application.is_active + project.closed_at guards. Validate pending→done/skipped/cancelled only.

issues.title: Test file location and fixture scope mismatch
issues.attack: projects/tests/ doesn't exist. Existing tests in tests/. conftest.py scope undefined.
issues.response: Confirmed projects/tests/ not found. Specify conftest location explicitly.

issues.title: Full test suite regression not gated
issues.attack: Only single-file run + manage.py check. Legacy tests may silently break.
issues.response: Accepted: add uv run pytest -v gate with xfail for known breakages. Rebutted: fixing legacy tests is Phase 2b/5 scope.

issues.title: Signal chain only manually tested
issues.attack: Most dangerous change (signal rewrite) has no automated tests.
issues.response: Add 4 signal integration tests in Phase 2a.

issues.title: Service lifecycle tests missing
issues.attack: drop/restore/hire tests deferred to Phase 5 is too late.
issues.response: Add service-level DB tests in Phase 2a.

issues.title: ActionType seed integrity untested
issues.attack: Seed failure causes ambiguous DoesNotExist, hard to diagnose.
issues.response: Django test runner applies all migrations including data migration. DoesNotExist error message includes lookup params. Separate integrity test is redundant.

issues.title: Auto-drop per-row save() performance (disputed portion)
issues.attack: N+1 at 5-20 scale is not MAJOR given bulk update already accepted.
issues.response: Red team conceded. Performance concern withdrawn.

issues.title: Legacy test fix scope (disputed portion)
issues.attack: Legacy refs are widespread beyond Phase 2a scope. xfail + green gate is appropriate.
issues.response: Red team conceded after codebase verification.

issues.title: ActionType seed integrity untested
issues.attack: Django get() exception message is fixed string without kwargs. Author's evidence was wrong.
issues.response: Author accepts. Django query.py:635 confirmed: DoesNotExist message does not include lookup params. Seed integrity test will be added.
